# Letters to Lucilius

*[Seneca](../philosophers/seneca.md) · 64*

A collection of one hundred and twenty-four moral letters Seneca addressed to his friend Lucilius, it is the major work of late Roman Stoicism. Each letter treats, in an intimate tone, a theme of the wise life: time, death, wealth, or friendship.
